name: BaishanCloud
description: Chinese edge-cloud provider (白山云) offering CDN, edge computing, object storage and security services.

seo.title: BaishanCloud — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: BaishanCloud: Chinese edge-cloud provider (白山云) offering CDN, edge computing, object storage and security services.

when_to_use: CDN acceleration for Chinese audiences with 1000+ domestic PoPs
Edge computing for low-latency applications in mainland China
Object storage with CDN delivery for media companies in China
DDoS protection and security for China-region web services
Video streaming acceleration across Chinese provincial networks

pros: Dense POP network across mainland China
Bundled CDN, security, and edge compute
Competitive pricing vs Alibaba and Tencent
cons: English docs and support are thin
Fewer integrations with Western DevOps stacks
review.verdict: Solid choice for China-market delivery with ICP, but a non-starter if you need polished global tooling.
review.best_for: Foreign businesses needing reliable in-China CDN with ICP-licensed POPs
review.not_for: Global-only teams needing English-first support and tight CI/CD integrations
